Thanks for contributing to fresco! Keep PRs to one logical change.

  feat(variant): aurora — a drifting polar curtain
  fix(ripple): rings no longer clip at the pane edge
  docs: clarify the LumRange contract
-->

Closes #

## Checklist

- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] `go vet ./...` is clean
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests (the pure-function contract holds:
      identical inputs → identical bytes, exactly `h`×`w` cells)
- [ ] Docs / comments updated if the public API or a variant changed

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything worth calling out: a rendered before/after, a design trade-off, an open question. -->
